message:
test: add cell close budget and control plane mock guardrail tests for execution orchestrator

Add low_cell_close_budget_returns_cell_budget_exhausted_error test
to verify that setting cell_close_budget_ms to 1 triggers a
CellError::BudgetExhausted with correct requested/remaining values.

Add production_orchestrator_source_avoids_control_plane_mocks test
to statically verify that the production source file does not import
or reference mock types (MockCx, MockBudget, trace_id_from_seed).

Update default_config_field_values and config_clone_preserves_all_fields
tests to cover the cell_close_budget_ms field. Apply rustfmt to
build_cell_close_context signature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
